code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = false
    if i == n
      is_sep = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if not have_prev or v != prev
            if first
              out = "#{v}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{v}"
            end
            prev = v
            have_prev = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
